# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\archaeoengineers_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = { is_gestalt = no }
	}
	modifier = {
		job_biologist_add = $BASE_AMOUNT$
	}
}

triggered_planet_modifier = {

	}

}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\bath_attendant_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.1|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\bath_attendant_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.05|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\early_habitat_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\early_habitat_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_primitive_laborer_add = $AMOUNT$
		job_farmer_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\early_habitat_add.txt -----

		}

}

				zone = zone_habitat_knights
			}

		has_modifier = slave_colony
	}

}

		planet = {
			bureaucrat_is_memorialist = yes
		}
	}
	planet_pops_upkeep_mult = -0.00625
	mult = value:scripted_ethics_weight_mult|ETHIC|xenophile|
}

		has_factory_designation = yes
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			is_machine_empire = yes
			is_catalytic_empire = no
			country_uses_consumer_goods = yes
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_fabricator_add = -$AMOUNT$
	}
}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.1|
}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.05|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\early_habitat_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

				}

		job_farmer_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.1|
}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.05|
}

triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

	pop_citizen_happiness = 0.00625

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.1|
}

		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}

					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.05|
}

triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.1|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\bath_attendant_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.05|
}

triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

					value > 0
				}
			}
		}

		job_farmer_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|

	pop_citizen_happiness = 0.00625

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.1|
}

		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}

					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.05|
}

triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.1|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\bath_attendant_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.05|
}

triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

					value > 0
				}
			}
		}

		job_farmer_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|

	pop_citizen_happiness = 0.00625

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.1|
}

		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}

					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.05|
}

triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.1|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\bath_attendant_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.05|
}

triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

					value > 0
				}
			}
		}

		job_farmer_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|

		}
	}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = { is_authoritarian = yes }
		planet = {
			bureaucrat_is_memorialist = yes
		}
	}
	country_edict_fund_add = 1
	mult = value:scripted_ethics_weight_mult|ETHIC|authoritarian|
}

}

}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\bath_attendant_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.1|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\bath_attendant_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.05|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\early_habitat_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\early_habitat_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_primitive_laborer_add = $AMOUNT$
		job_farmer_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.1|
}

					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser

	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }

			}

	}

		}

				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.05|
}

					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.1|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\bath_attendant_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.05|
}

triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

		owner = { is_gestalt = no }
		NOT = {
			has_zone = {
				zone = zone_habitat_knights
			}
		}
		has_modifier = slave_colony
	}
	job_battle_thrall_add = $AMOUNT$
}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.1|
}

		exists = owner
		owner = {

				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {

					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser
				}

					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine"

				}
			}
		}
	}

triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

		exists = owner
		owner = { is_xenophile = yes }
		planet = {
			bureaucrat_is_memorialist = yes
		}
	}
	planet_pops_upkeep_mult = -0.00625
	mult = value:scripted_ethics_weight_mult|ETHIC|xenophile|
}

		}

			}
		}
	}

	}
}

		NOT = { uses_district_set = city_world }
		has_factory_designation = yes
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			is_machine_empire = yes
			is_catalytic_empire = no
			country_uses_consumer_goods = yes
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_fabricator_add = -$AMOUNT$
	}
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\industrial_districts_foundry_add.txt -----

	potential = {
		is_planet_class = pc_machine
		has_factory_designation = yes
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			is_machine_empire = yes
			is_catalytic_empire = no
			country_uses_consumer_goods = yes
			has_ascension_perk = ap_machine_worlds
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_fabricator_add = -$AMOUNT$
	}
}

				}
			}
		}
	}

	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\job_enforcer_additional_modifiers.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			is_oligarchic_authority = yes
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = synth_physical
				has_country_flag = synth_virtual
			}
		}
	}

				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }

			}
		}
	}

		owner = {
			OR = {
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths" }
				has_councilor = { COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine" }
			}
		}
	}
	job_bath_attendant_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.1|
}

		exists = owner

				}
				has_councilor_with_trait_tier1or2 = {
					COUNCILOR = "councilor_toxic_baths_individual_machine"
					TRAIT = leader_trait_substance_abuser

					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths"

					COUNCILOR = "councilor_corporate_toxic_baths_individual_machine"

				}
			}
		}
	}

	mult = value:bath_attendant_skill|MULT|0.05|

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\early_habitat_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_regular_empire = yes
					is_tankbound_empire = no
				}
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_clerk_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\early_habitat_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		OR = {
			is_scope_valid = no
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
				num_zones = {
					type = zone_early_habitat
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		job_primitive_laborer_add = $AMOUNT$
		job_farmer_add = $AMOUNT$
	}
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\early_habitat_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = { is_tankbound_empire = yes }
		num_zones = {
			type = zone_early_habitat
			value > 0
		}
	}
	job_production_overseer_add = $AMOUNT$
	mult = value:count_zones|TYPE|zone_early_habitat|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\enforcers_add.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			is_regular_empire = yes
			NOT = {
				has_valid_civic = civic_dystopian_society
			}
		}
	}
	job_enforcer_add = $AMOUNT$
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\ethic_job_modifiers.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = { is_pacifist = yes }
		planet = {
			has_ethics_output = yes
		}
	}
	planet_amenities_add = 100
	mult = value:scripted_modifier_ethics_weight_mult|MODIFIER|pop_job_amenities_mult|ETHIC|pacifist|
}

# ----- SOURCE: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stellaris\common\inline_scripts\jobs\ethic_job_modifiers.txt -----
triggered_planet_modifier = {
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = { is_xenophobe = yes }
		planet = {
			has_ethics_output = yes
		}
	}
	pop_citizen_happiness = 0.00625
	mult = value:scripted_ethics_weight_mult|ETHIC|xenophobe|
}

		}

	}

	}
}

	}
